title: Can I populate dropdown field (seetings) values from my app
excerpt: In a board view app I need to add a settings field (dropdown) which gets populated from my react app. Is this possible? Any hints are welcome :slight_smile:

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: In a board view app I need to add a settings field (dropdown) which gets populated from my react app. Is this possible? Any hints are welcome

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @basdebruin,

I asked for this a little while ago, it is on it’s way, but not available yet.

It will work in the same way that you can populate a field in an integration app.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@basdebruin and @mitchell.hudson

Sorry for our delay in response here, this one seems to have slipped through the cracks! I definitely understand how this would be an important feature to introduce and as soon as we’ll get any further news about this feature, I’ll post here

-Alex
